title: phaseolus vulgaris var. fragarinus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. fragarinus, also known as kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is native to the Americas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and fever. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. fragarinus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, or used in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile and easily accessible remedy for those looking to incorporate its benefits into their daily routine.
